title: URIs, URL Resolution, Origins, DNS, and Destination Identity · Go Client Systems · Goroutine Forensics
summary: An on-call reliability engineer tracing a production client incident must isolate a plausible but incorrect result from conflicting traces, repair its cause, and retain a regression witness for uris, url resolution, origins, dns, and destination identity, producing destination-resolution and origin contract. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a Go 1.26 net/http destination-resolution and origin contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners p…
objectives: Parse scheme, authority, host, port, path, query, and fragment and resolve relative references against the correct base. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Encode path segments and query names or values at the correct structural layer without double encoding. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Compare origins from scheme, host, and effective port while separating URI authority, Host, and connection address. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Uri Components Resolution
steps.instruction:
debug case — Go incident collection agent receives base https://api4.example.test/v1/items/ and reference ../reports?q=a%2Fb. Resolve it structurally, compare origin and authority, trace two DNS answers, and reject any connected destination outside the approved range. Competency probe: Parse scheme, authority, host, port, path, query, and fragment and resolve relative references against the correct base. Demonstrate the result through Go 1.26 net/http, net/url, context, io, crypto/tls, RoundTripper, and httptest evidence.

Inspect the Uri Components Resolution trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Uri Components Resolution.

For Go Inspect the failure record · Debug Uri Components Resolution, keep Uri Components Resolution connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
